zh.lifeSummary: 當William Marsse於大約1525年出生在英國英格蘭艾可時，他的父親William James Marcy21歲，母親Margaret Wodkers26歲。他於1549年2月1日與Margret Wayer在英國英格蘭哈普爾笛卡爾 阿爾雷斯福德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1569年9月26日在英國倫敦享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Marsse于大约1525年出生在英国英格兰艾可时，他的父亲William James Marcy21岁，母亲Margaret Wodkers26岁。他于1549年2月1日与Margret Wayer在英国英格兰哈普爾笛卡爾 阿爾雷斯福德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1569年9月26日在英国倫敦享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: Marsse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from either of two places so called in North Yorkshire, name with Old English mersc ‘marsh’, the -sk being the result of Scandinavian influence.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When William Marsse was born about 1525, in Essex, England, United Kingdom, his father, William James Marcy, was 21 and his mother, Margaret Wodkers, was 26. He married Margret Wayer on 1 February 1549, in Old Alresford, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 26 September 1569, in London, England, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Marsse est né environ 1525, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William James Marcy, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Margaret Wodkers, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Margret Wayer le 1 février 1549, à Old Alresford, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 26 septembre 1569, à Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 45 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: William Marsse(이)가 대략 1525년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William James Marcy(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Wodkers(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1549년 2월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 드 올레스퍼드에서 Margret Wayer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1569년 9월 26일 영국 런던에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Marsse родился около 1525 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William James Marcy было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Wodkers, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Margret Wayer 1 февраля 1549 г. в местности олд алресфорд, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 26 сентября 1569 г. в местности Лондон, Англия в возрасте 45 лет.
